title: triticum lolioides var. muticum
intro: Triticum lolioides var. muticum, also known as the 'Eared Barley', is a type of wild barley that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and the relief of respiratory problems. Triticum lolioides var. muticum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
